title: cordia gardneri
intro: Cordia gardneri, also known as the Wild Pear or Babool tree, is a small to medium-sized deciduous tree native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cordia gardneri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. Cordia gardneri is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
